import io
import list
import string

fn process(_ s: String) -> Unit
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if b == 43 and not in_num
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign * 2)
        end
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign * 2)
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  process(s)
when None
  println("")
end
